title: Moving around without the mouse
drDigitalIntro:
You can move around using just the keyboard.
• Press Tab to jump to the next button or box.
• Press Shift+Tab to jump back.
• Use the arrow keys to move through text or lists.
drDigitalSuccess: Now you can get around hands-on-keyboard — Tab forward, Shift+Tab back!
drDigitalHint: Read through the navigation keys, then click Continue whenever you're ready.
